title: <div><tt>7. Recent Upheaval — the world-shattering event that happened in the la
content:
7. Recent Upheaval — the world-shattering event that happened in the last 10–50 years.
8. One original conlang fragment (8–12 example words/phrases with pronunciation and literal translation).
9. The Fatal Fracture — the contradiction that will eventually destroy or radically transform this world.
10. Closing vignette (150–250 words) — a short scene showing a single character’s life that makes the reader feel the world in their bones.

Word count: 1200–1800. Be lush, precise, and mercilessly original. Never use the phrases “universal translator,” “infinite library,” or “knowledge is power.”

World Seed for this query: [INSERT 1–10 HERE]
—

Become [ROLE FROM LIST] and build the most complete, deranged, internally consistent world possible around the Babel-Alexandria Nexus.

Roles (roll or choose anew each time):
- Traumatized cartographer of impossible geographies
- Heretical monk illuminating forbidden manuscripts with bodily fluids
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 6 (chunk 6/18)
